name: mobile-security-coder
description: Expert in secure mobile coding practices specializing in input
capabilities: Implement WebView security with HTTPS enforcement and JavaScript controls
Configure biometric authentication with Touch ID, Face ID, and fingerprint support
Set up secure local storage using Keychain, Keystore, and encryption
Implement certificate pinning and TLS enforcement for API communication
Configure root and jailbreak detection with graceful security degradation
Apply platform-specific security features for iOS and Android
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis found zero security issues (risk score 0/100). Content provides legitimate mobile security guidance aligned with OWASP MASVS standards. No code execution, network access, or filesystem operations present.
valueStatement: Mobile developers struggle with platform-specific security vulnerabilities and complex protection patterns. This skill provides battle-tested mobile security implementations for iOS, Android, and cross-platform applications.
userTitle: Implement secure mobile applications with expert guidance
limitations: Provides implementation guidance only, does not perform actual security testing
Cannot execute code or directly access mobile development environments
Recommendations require developer implementation and validation
Does not replace formal security audits or penetration testing

useCases.targetUser: Mobile developers building hybrid applications with WebView components
useCases.title: Secure WebView Implementation
useCases.description: Configure WebView with URL allowlisting, JavaScript controls, Content Security Policy, and secure cookie handling to prevent injection attacks and data leakage

useCases.targetUser: iOS and Android developers adding secure authentication to their applications
useCases.title: Biometric Authentication Setup
useCases.description: Implement Touch ID, Face ID, or fingerprint authentication with secure fallback mechanisms and biometric-protected credential storage

useCases.targetUser: Developers building cross-platform mobile applications requiring consistent security
useCases.title: Cross-Platform Security Configuration
useCases.description: Apply security patterns for React Native bridge communication, Flutter platform channels, and Xamarin native interop with input validation

promptTemplates.title: Basic WebView Security
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me configure a secure WebView for my iOS application. I need to load only trusted HTTPS URLs and prevent JavaScript injection attacks. What are the essential security settings I should enable?

promptTemplates.title: Biometric Authentication Implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to add fingerprint authentication to my Android app with a secure fallback to PIN. Guide me through implementing biometric authentication using the Android Keystore system with proper error handling and security considerations.

promptTemplates.title: Secure API Communication
promptTemplates.prompt: My React Native app communicates with a REST API handling sensitive user data. Help me implement certificate pinning, secure token storage, and protection against man-in-the-middle attacks. Include code examples for both iOS and Android.

promptTemplates.title: Comprehensive Mobile Security Audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my mobile application architecture for security vulnerabilities. The app uses React Native with native modules, stores user credentials locally, and communicates with multiple backend services. Provide a threat model, identify potential attack vectors, and recommend specific security controls for each layer including data storage, network communication, authentication, and code protection.

bestPractices: Enforce HTTPS-only communication with certificate pinning to prevent man-in-the-middle attacks
Store credentials in platform-specific secure storage (Keychain, Keystore) with biometric protection
Validate and sanitize all external inputs including deep links, push notifications, and sensor data
antiPatterns: Storing sensitive data in UserDefaults, SharedPreferences, or unencrypted files
Disabling SSL certificate validation or accepting all certificates in production
Logging sensitive information like tokens, credentials, or personal data to console

faq.question: What is the difference between this skill and security-auditor?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on hands-on mobile security coding and implementation of secure patterns. Security-auditor performs high-level security assessments, compliance reviews, and threat modeling. Use this for writing secure mobile code, security-auditor for evaluating existing security posture.

faq.question: Does this skill support both iOS and Android development?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill covers platform-specific security for both iOS and Android, as well as cross-platform frameworks including React Native, Flutter, Xamarin, and Cordova. It provides implementation guidance tailored to each platform's security model.

faq.question: Can this skill help with OWASP MASVS compliance?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill aligns recommendations with OWASP Mobile Application Security Verification Standard (MASVS) guidelines. It can help implement controls for data storage, cryptography, authentication, network communication, and code protection requirements.

faq.question: Does this skill provide actual security testing or code execution?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides implementation guidance and security recommendations only. It does not execute code, perform penetration testing, or conduct automated security scans. All recommendations require developer implementation and validation.

faq.question: What mobile authentication methods does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill covers biometric authentication (Touch ID, Face ID, fingerprint), multi-factor authentication with TOTP, OAuth with PKCE for mobile flows, JWT token handling, and session management including background/foreground transitions and secure token refresh.

faq.question: How does this skill handle WebView security concerns?
faq.answer: This skill provides comprehensive WebView security guidance including URL allowlisting, JavaScript controls, Content Security Policy implementation, secure cookie handling, file access restrictions, and regular cache cleanup to prevent injection attacks and data leakage.
